description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Manual build binary on Windows (x86-64) that triggers on push to the qt6 branch and allows manual dispatch. In a single windows-2022 job, check out the code, set up a build environment with MSVC, install Python 3.13 with pip caching, upgrade pip, install Qt 6.7.3, and various Python packages including numpy, PyQt6, and pyinstaller. Then build Veusz extensions and a Windows binary with pyinstaller, and upload the resulting artifact.
